changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.comment: One-time bootstrap (run as gmdbuser). Pre-req: schema "liquibase" already created manually by gmdbuser. Creates roles/users, schema gmdb, permissions, and default privileges.

changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.comment: Set ownership/permissions on Liquibase metadata tables created during bootstrap when Liquibase ran as gmdbuser. Liquibase (running later as gmdb_admin) must be able to read/update these tables BEFORE any changeSets execute.
